PolicyPopup.Title: Library Policies & Permissions
CommonLines: I confirm the entered details are correct.
Borrowing is subject to library rules and availability.
Any misuse may result in account suspension.

USER: This account will be sent for approval and stay INACTIVE until approved.
Default menus: MAKE PAYMENT, MAKE RESERVATION.
Member search is NOT allowed for USER group.
ADMIN: Access is enabled as per assigned permissions.
